race.comment: LISELLE'S LUCK (6) is a consistent mare who looks well placed here. She just found one better last start at Murray Bridge in a BM58 which looks a tick stronger than this. She should take holding out. HIDDEN BOUNTY (1) resumes having finished fourth at this track and distance at her last appearance five months ago. She walked in with a recent Bordertown trial and draws nicely. SOUTHERN MONARCH (3) is a lightly raced mare in her first campaign, a solid Clare maiden winner on debut before another good effort at Gawler. She can improve again. FULL COMMITMENT (7) resumes for a new yard. Her NSW form stacks up well enough for this and she's won a trial, watch the betting. IRREFUTABLY (2) was god last time at Gawler and that has her right in the mix.
